scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard content accurately: supported bases, architectures, single-base, multi-base shorthand and long form, cross-compilation, architecture-independent. Adds extra valid details.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states riscv64 build-on can list 'amd64, riscv64' (two values) which may not be valid per the gold standard pattern, but this is a minor inaccuracy rather than a fabricated API. Also mentions 'bases key is deprecated' which is correct context but goes slightly beyond the gold standard.
